title: alsine radicans
intro: Alsine radicans, also known as Alsine or Creeping Pearlwort, is a low-growing, mat-forming perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects due to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Alsine radicans include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Alsine radicans can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
